title: psacalium argutum
intro: Psacalium argutum, also known as tree marigold, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and saponins. The health benefits of Psacalium argutum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Psacalium argutum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
